title: [i18n ④] CLI 정적 사용자 문구 다국어화
source_request:
[i18n ④] CLI 정적 사용자 문구 다국어화

## 배경 / 의도

런타임 CLI 사용자 문구가 지금 ~97% 영어 + 엔진 용어. 사용자 결정: 대화 표면(①~③)부터 한국어화하고, CLI에 박힌 정적 문장은 **언어 전환 가능한 구조(i18n)**로 분리해 한국어 등 다국어로 표시될 수 있게 한다.

## 범위

- `writeHuman`/`writeError` ~1,376곳 (work.ts 196, autopilot.ts 173, memory.ts 159, deep-interview.ts 120, e2e.ts 107, prism.ts 96 …)
- `--help` description ~809개
- 문자열을 코드에서 분리(카탈로그) + 언어 선택 메커니즘

## 처리 순서 / 의존성

④번. 독립 축 — 하드 의존 없음. 우선순위 끝.

## 링크

- ditto work item: `wi_2607130ld`
goal: ditto --help (top-level and every subcommand) renders its command and argument descriptions from an en+ko locale catalog: with DITTO_LANG unset or =en the descriptions are byte-identical to the current English, and with DITTO_LANG=ko they render Korean. Runtime writeHuman/writeError output is out of scope.

acceptance_criteria.statement: With DITTO_LANG unset and with DITTO_LANG=en, ditto --help and every subcommand --help render command/arg descriptions byte-identical to the current English output, and the full test suite stays green (command dispatch unaffected by the closure conversion).
With DITTO_LANG=ko, ditto --help and subcommand --help render the Korean description for each catalogued command and argument.
Locale is resolved before runMain() from the DITTO_LANG env var with default en, and an unknown/empty value falls open to en, verified by a unit test.
All 809 command and argument description strings across src/cli/commands are sourced from the en+ko catalog with no inline description literal remaining, and a missing ko key returns its en value.
writeHuman/writeError runtime output is unchanged (no runtime string is rerouted through the catalog), confirmed by the existing runtime-output assertions staying green.
